findings.detail: DecisionTicket fields: direction, instrument, position_size_pct, entry_level, stop_loss, take_profit, risk_budget_consumed_bps, conviction_score, correlation_overlay, catalyst_timeline, max_hold_days. All are investment parameters — no PII, no personal identifiers, no account numbers.

Position data stored via archiver.log_decision() as structured dict and via session_mgr.save(SessionState). No raw user input stored unsanitized. Conversation text sanitized via sanitize_for_llm_prompt() before archiving.

_parse_field_update() uses regex with predefined field_map — only recognized keys (入场/止损/止盈/标的/仓位/风险/催化剂/最大持有/信心) are parsed. Numeric values converted via float()/int() with ValueError catch. No eval/exec. Percentages adjusted safely (max 1.0 clamp).
Before proceeding to execution, validates stop_loss > 0 and instrument non-empty. Pre-trade checklist runs BEFORE confirmation — all blockers must pass. '强制确认' override exists but is explicit opt-in.
datetime.now(timezone.utc) used at lines 228 (Gate3Session.started_at), 303 (DecisionTicket.created_at), 375 (market_data timestamp). No bare datetime.now() calls.
No subprocess calls, no shell execution, no eval/exec. All operations are pure Python string/regex matching.
